'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/UKThreatLevel\/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=zQq009LIBY7nzAH.S.xrrdlQ13.JVz0r0wtj9odA.ks-1773500393-1.0.1.1-WJYaiDedNXARNCfPI4QJ0IxAlb_JRlOS9xxtdM3A89g"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
